race.comment: STAR BLING (5) is holding her form this campaign. Had genuine excuses from the wide gate when she warmed up late from back in the field to run sixth over 1600m at Albury. Has a good record here with winning rider going back aboard. Leading player. EVOKES (9) drops in trip and class after he chipped away late to finish fourth over 2200m here on February 1. Can produce fresh with the solid tempo. Respect. WISH YOU WERE HERE (2) in career best form and can go one better here after finishing a gritty second over 1600m at Corowa in C2 class. Look for her closing strongly. FIRE AND GEMSTONE (3) scored at this track over 1600m on a soft track last start in a race not dissimilar to this. Has appeal.
